title: kochia scoparia subsp. densiflora
intro: Kochia scoparia subsp. densiflora, also known as Chinese burnweed or dense flowered burning bush, is a shrub-like plant native to East Asia and parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Kochia scoparia subsp. densiflora include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to reap its health benefits.
